titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 175: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 175. (A.R. No. 488 of 1925.) SEMBIYANMĀDĒVI, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west and south bases, central shrine, Kailāsanāthasvāmi temple.
This inscription is connected with the above one and is evidently a supplement to it.
It refers to the apportionment of paddy for the various items required for conducting the ceremonies of sacred bath (the anointment of god) and also possibly for the great feeding of the brāhmaṇas.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 380.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesarivarmmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 5 Āvatu tenkaraiy Aḷaṉāṭṭu prahmadeyam cempiyanmahādevicaturvedimaṅkalattu śrīkayilāsamuṭaiyamahādevarkku tiṅkaḷ saṅkrāntitoṟum snapanañceytaruḷuvataṟku muttanampirāṭṭiyār Uṟaṭṭaiyan coḻappaiyārāṉa tribhuvanamahādevi
vaytta nipantappaṭi tiṭṭiyatu Ativāsaṉaikku pālikaikku kiḻaṭṭa ḷa� muḷaiyaṭṭa payaṟuṅkaṭukum Eḷḷum mutalāka veṇṭuvaṉa Ellāttukkum teṉ kūvukka+teṉ 2māyāka Akka+ ḷa6 Āka ḷa6 ney 2mā 10kku ḷā Āka ney 6kku ḷa6(1/2)myāka pāl 2mākku ḷayāka pāl 6kku ḷa kū tayi
�rkku ḷa sayāka tayir 6kku ḷā10 4 kaṭuku tmaḷa(1/4)sa yāka kaṭuku çkku ḷā3 Eḷḷu sakkuḷa ç yāka Eḷḷu çkku ḷa2 10 3 mañcaḷ poṭikku A kku ḷa3 10 3 vāḻaiypaḻamum pilāppaḻamum māmpaḻamum kiḷikaḷeñcippaḻamum nārattampaḻamum mātaḷaṅkāyum maṟṟum palaṅkaḷu
kkumāka ḷa2� snamanadravyattukku Akka+ ḷa6 pori çkku ḷa6 taruppaṇam ḷa ç kalacak kayirm Ativāsaṉaikku pālikaiyum peruntiruvamutukku veṇṭum kalacamum Iṭuṅkucavaṉukku ḷavu kalacattiṉ kiḻaṭṭa Arici 3 10 3ḷanma2mā kalacattiṉ kiḻ Aṭṭa Eḷḷu 3kku ḷa
3 kalaca cuṟṟum ṉūl ttukku Akkam (1/4)kku ḷa3 jalapavitram vaṭikka puṭavai 1 pradhāna kalacam cuṟṟa puṭavaiy 2āka puṭavai 3 Akka3ndha ntanam Uriy kuḻampukku cantanam 5 palattukku ḷa3ç Aṟṟaiy ṉāḷāl paḷḷittāmamiṭuvāṉ+ ḷa3m peruntiruvamutukku Arici na ceṉṉelāl
Añciraṇṭu vaṇṇamāka 3 10 3 neyyamitu viḷa3 mirtu 9kku ḷa3 paruppamutu �kku ḷa3mā tayiramirtu sakku ḷā9 palakāyam Iru cer paṭimāyiṉāl ḷa3carkkaraiy + palattukkum vāḻaippaḻam [2 10]kkum Āka ḷa¬savi viṟakiṭuvāṉukku ḷa3 10 6ç citāri cantanamum Akilum neriyā
[sa]mum kaṟpūramum teva ḷakaṇyā[ha]varicikku brāhmaṇarkku porilaiy peṟuṅ kā 5 10ḷa3 10 6 viḷakku 4 10kku Eṇṇai 2ḷavū niṟmāniyam poka Aṭṭuvāṉukku ḷandha darbhaimālaikku pullaṟukkavum Aṭṭuvāṉukkum ḷaç toraṇañ ceyyum taccaṉukku ḷaçm
ñcaḷ poṭi yiṭippāḷukku maval maṭṭavumāka ḷa3 tirumeḻukkiṭuvāṉukku ḷaç Uttaramayanamum dakṣaṇamayanamumāka saṅkrān=ti [ 2- ṇṭu] kku paricaṭṭakaṇaikku kācu + ṉāl ḷayisa Uttaramayana saṅkrān=tiṉāḷ Uṇṇum brāhmaṇar 100m dakṣiṇamayana saṅkrān=tiṉāṉṟu Uṇṇum brāhmaṇar 100m Āka brāhmaṇar 2 100- varkku perāl ḷa3 yāka
brāhmaṇar 2 100- varkku ḷa2vū tirunondāviḷakku 1 Uḻakku cella nicca ḷa3 yāka Orāṭṭai ṉāḷaikku ḷa3m Āka saṅkrānti ḷā0kkā� Āka saṅkrān=ti(2) 2ṉāl brāhmaṇar 2 100varkkum ḷā0na6 Āka saṅkrān=ti 2 ṇṭukkum niṭṭam 1 viḷakku 6 rokikku ḷā0�m tirunontāviḷakña + kku Orāṭṭaiynāḷaikku ḷa3 100m Āka ḷa2 100 5 10 6 10 3māitu candrādityavaṟ niṟkkac ceytatu .§
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 175 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
